case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INSUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. REN LEI CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INSUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT REN LEI CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. AND IT'S SUCCESSORS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INSUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REN LEI CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. AND IT'S SUCCESSORS $4,105.00 PRINCIPAL, $689.42 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,019.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INSUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT REN LEI CONSTRUCTION COMPANY, INC. AND IT'S SUCCESSORS
